description: Cartesia provides voice AI APIs and tools for text-to-speech, speech-to-text, voice cloning/localization, and conversational agents. Its platform includes developer APIs plus hosted and local MCP access for AI clients.
summary: Cartesia exposes a versioned HTTPS API at `https://api.cartesia.ai` (including realtime WebSocket endpoints), a public unauthenticated API status endpoint, a hosted MCP server at `https://mcp.cartesia.ai/mcp`, and a local `cartesia-mcp` CLI/server package authenticated with Cartesia credentials.
